scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @lumen/db build && pnpm --filter @lumen/backend build && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @lumen/db build && pnpm --filter @lumen/backend build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @lumen/db build && pnpm --filter @lumen/backend build && tsx --test test/*.test.ts
